titleStmt.title: SII 10.248: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 248. (A.R. No. 803 of 1922.) ON A PILLAR PLANTED BEFORE THE TEMPLE OF CHENNAKĒŚAVASVĀMI, IḌUPULAPĀḌU, BAPATLA TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. Ś. 1131.

summary.p: States that the village of Iḍupulapāḍu in the Karmarāshṭra was originally granted by Mukkaṇṭi Pallava to certain Brahmins of Kāṇva-Śākhā and that king Gaṇapatidēva regranted it to the Brahmins. Contains a list of the donees and their shares.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmattriṇayanapa
llavaparikṣitanirūpitapu
ṇyarūpasastaśatāgra
hārāvatārayōgya
ka¨rmmāruhaka¨rmmarāṣṭrē I
ḍupulapāṭināmagrāmā
grahāra kātyāyanasūtra
kāṇyaśākhāgrihyēbhyō nānā
gōtrēbhyō vēdavidbhyō brāhma
ṇēbhya sa¨rvvakāraparihā
ra mācaṁdrā¨rkkaṁ dattaḥ .
bahubhi ¨rvvasudhā dattā rā
jabhi ssagarā dapi ya
sya yasya yadā bhūmi
tasya tasya tadā phalaṁ .
tatra grāmādhipō dāma
nā¨ryya viṁśatibhā
gī bayyanā¨ryya viṁśa
tibhāgī . koṁkanā¨ryya
viṁśatibhāgī . kētanā
¨ryya daśabhāgī . sūranā
¨ryya . dāmanāyya . muttanā
¨ryya . kommanā¨ryya . brahmanā
yya prōlanāyya . dāmanā¨ryya
cevvanā¨ryya . bayyanā¨ryya .
bhīmanā¨ryya . Anēna bharadvā
jagōtrāya . cāmanāyya
dvibhāgī . māranā¨ryya . sū
ranā¨ryyabhāgā dvē . viṣṇanā
¨ryyabhāgā dvē . dōranā¨ryya dvi
bhāgī . kētanā¨ryya A¨rddhādhika
bhāgī . kommanā¨ryya . kāma
nā¨ryya . viḍuranāyya . nā
ranā¨rya A¨rddhādhikabhāgī . ko
mmanā¨ryya . nāranā¨ryya .

Eṟṟanā¨ryya prōlanā
yya . mattanā¨ryya . ko
mmanāyya . sūranā¨ryya .
nāganā¨ryya . Anēna kauṁ
ḍinyagōtrāya . Anda
nā¨ryya . dēvanā¨ryyadvi
bhāgī dēvanā¨ryya . prō
lanā¨ryya . rāmanā¨ryya
A¨rddhādhikabhāgī . malla
nā¨ryya dvibhāgī . ma
llanāyya . Amaranā
¨ryya . bayyanā¨ryya .
māranā¨ryya dvibhā
gī . sōmanā¨ryya . padmanā¨ryya . vāsa
nā¨ryya . sūranā¨ryya .
bācanā¨ryya . dāmanā
¨ryya bhāgā dvē . nāganā¨ryya
kētanā¨ryya . brammanā
¨ryya . prōlanā¨ryya . [A]nē
nakāśyapagōtrāya .
kōṭanā¨ryya A[¨r*]ddhādhikatri
bhāgī . kētanāyya . kanna
nā¨ryya . prōlanā¨ryya . kēśa
nā¨ryya . Anēna śālaṁghyāya
nagōtrāya . rudranā¨ryya
paṁccabhāgī . kēśavā¨ryya .
padmanābha Ā¨ryya . mā
ranā¨ryya . kausikagōtra .
nāganā¨ryya . kommanā
¨ryya . Amaranāyya .
kaṁṭanā¨ryya . śrīvacca
gōtra . jannanā¨ryya . kaṟṟinā
¨ryya . Appanā¨ryya . nārāya
ṇā¨ryya . Annanā¨ryya . gauta
magōtra . mrānanā¨ryya .
kētanāyya . brammanā
¨ryya . kāśyapagōtra .
māranā¨ryya kāśyapagōtra .
bayyanā¨ryya gautamagōtra .
vēmanā¨ryya bharadvā
jagōtra .

nallanā¨ryya . pōtanā
yya dvibhāgī . sūranā
¨ryya . nāganā¨ryya . tri
puranā¨ryya A¨rddhādhika
bhāgī . sūranā¨ryya bhā
gō¨rddhō . bhīmanā¨ryya bhāgā
¨rddhī . nāganā¨ryya bhāgā¨rddhi
cavuṁḍanā¨ryya bhāgā dvē
muttanā¨ryya . śrīrā
manā¨ryya bhāgā¨rddhi . nāma
nā¨ryya . Annanā¨ryya . Anēna
bharadvājagōtrāya . kē
śavā¨ryya haritagōtra .
kautamabhāgōtulasinā
yya . kāmanā¨ryya . kēśavā¨ryya .
cāyanā¨ryya . kauśikagōtrā
dēvanā¨ryya . Amaranā¨ryya .
bharadvājagōtra . kētanāyyagō
tamagōtra . sūranā¨ryya
kāśyapagōtra . [Ē]kabhāgī
svasti śrīśakava¨rṣa 1131 A
gu nēṁṭi mēṣaśaṁkrāṁtti
svasti śrīmanmahāmaṇḍa
lēśvarakākatiyyagaṇapa
tidēvamahārājulu
pū¨rvvadattamugā neṟigi
Icciri . boppallipe
ddanā¨ryya paṁcabhāgī
Eṟapōtamaṁcci
dvibhāgī bhāradvā
jagōtra .

grāmataḥ pū¨rvvadikku reṁḍḍa
kuṁṭalu dīni dakṣiṇamu
dūbaguṁṭa dīni dakṣiṇa
mu maṁccenaguṁṭa Ā
gnēyaṁ ĀlēṭiUttama
ḍuka dakṣiṇataḥ Ālēṟu
nai¨ryṛti kaḍirājuka
ṭva dīni Uttaramu ve
nna peddikuṁṭa dīni Utta
ramu takkelapāḍu paścima
taḥ taliyakuṁṭa
vāyutaḥ gaṁggādharu
nikuṁṭa dīni tū¨rpu na
llaṁjeṟvu Alvu dīni
tū¨rpu Aṁkkamupāla
Uttarataḥ takkelapāḍu
Īśānyataḥ kanyelapā
ṭiṁguṁṭa . madvaṁśajāḥ
paramahīpativaṁśa
jā vā pāpavyapētama
nasō bhuvi bhāvibhū
pāḥ yē pālayaṁtti mama
dha¨rmma mimaṁ samastaṁ tē
ṣā mmayā viracitāṁja
li rēṣa mū¨rddhiḥ . sāmānyō
yaṁ dha¨rmmanētuṁ nripāṇāṁ
kālē kālē pālaniyyō bha
vadbhiḥ sa¨rvvāṁ nētān bhāvitaḥ pā
¨rtthivēṁdrān bhūyō bhūyyō
yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . sva
dattaṁ dviguṇaṁ puṇya paradatta
ca pālināṁ ṣaṣṭi ¨rvva¨rṣasahasrā
ṇi sva¨rggalōkē mahīyatē . svadattaṁ
paradattaṁ vā yō harēti va
suṁddarī ṣaṣṭi ¨rvva¨rṣasaha
srāṇa viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kri [.]
